title: Kingfisher, WA restaurant review on Bainbridge Island
content: KINGFISHER: the roasted carrots were exceptional in flavor. The sauce that went with them was imaginative and delicious. Chicory salad fresh and crisp.

title: Kingfisher Natual Area, Washington - 25 Reviews, Map
content: Lovely green space, well maintained, but not recommended right now. Fallen leaves and mud make it very slippery and the steep spots are treacherous.
